title: $:/plugins/wikilabs/devtools
author: pmario
name: Developer Tools
description: Hover tooltips, context menu, variable inspector, source viewer. Useful for any TiddlyWiki developer.
readme:
!! Source Position Tracking Plugin

This plugin adds `data-source-pos` attributes to rendered HTML elements and links, tracing each back to its source tiddler and line range. Works across transclusion boundaries — macros, procedures, and list widgets all report their correct source.

!!! Format

The `data-source-pos` attribute value is: `L{start}-L{end} @ tiddlerTitle` (multi-line) or `L{line} @ tiddlerTitle` (single-line).

Line numbers are file-ready — they include the `.tid` file header offset and macro body offset.

!!! Interactions

* ''Hover'' — tooltip showing source position, context (`currentTiddler`), and caller chain
* ''Right-click'' — context menu with copy options, navigation, source viewer, and optional edit features

* ''Ctrl+right-click'' — native browser context menu (passthrough)

!!! Right-Click Context Menu

The context menu header shows the source position with two icon buttons:

* ''Edit'' (pencil icon) — opens the tiddler in edit mode and selects the corresponding source text
* ''Show source'' (eye icon) — appends the source code to the Source Viewer panel

Below the header: copy tiddler title, copy source position, open source tiddler, and open caller tiddlers.

!!! Source Viewer

A floating, draggable, resizable panel that accumulates source code entries. Click the eye icon in the context menu to add entries.

* ''Deduplication'' — if the same source (same procedure/snippet) is viewed again from a different context, a new header is added above the existing code block instead of duplicating it
* ''Origin highlighting'' — hovering an entry header blinks the origin element 3 times in red, then shows a steady blue outline. With exactly 1 entry, the origin is always highlighted.
* ''Edit button'' — each entry header has an edit icon to open the source in the tiddler editor
* ''Remove'' — remove individual headers or use "Clear" to remove all entries
* ''Max entries'' — 100 entries maximum; oldest are removed when exceeded
* ''Layout persistence'' — size and position are stored in-memory (no store writes)

!!! Configuration

|!Tiddler |!Values |!Description |
|`$:/config/wikilabs/SourcePositionTracking` |`yes` / `no` |Enable or disable source position tracking. Default: `no` |
|`$:/config/wikilabs/SourcePositionTracking/ShowEditMenuItem` |`show` / (empty) |Show "Edit at L..." menu item in the right-click context menu. Default: hidden |
!!! How It Works

The plugin uses TiddlyWiki's hook system — zero overhead when disabled:

* `th-dom-rendering-element` hook — adds `data-source-pos` to HTML elements
* `th-dom-rendering-link` hook — adds `data-source-pos` to link elements
* `th-dom-rendering-codeblock` hook — adds `data-source-pos` to code blocks
* Monkey-patches the transclude widget to track source context across transclusion boundaries

The only core changes required are `th-dom-rendering-link` hook call in `link.js` and `th-dom-rendering-codeblock` hook call in `codeblock.js`.

-------

The full documentation can be found at [[devtools plugin|https://wikilabs.github.io/editions/devtools/]] main page.

''Important'': This plugin modifies several core modules
